ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the news source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the news source */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the news source is based */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language used by the news source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category (e.g., NEWS) */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., News and media) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news source the article belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES news_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the article belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_subcategories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the article belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Full text of the comment */,
  "comment_score" REAL /* Score of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating given by the user (e.g., like, dislike) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fake_news_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was made */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Full text of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fake_news_reports_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fake_news_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data sample */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the data belongs to */,
  "data_text" TEXT /* Text of the training data sample */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the training data sample (e.g., fake, real) */,
  "label_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the label assigned to the training data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
